task_completion.description: A custom grading scale named 'Clinical Competency Scale' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Moodle Site administration (Grades > Scales) or scale edit page, the name 'Clinical Competency Scale' is visible.

task_completion.description: The scale has the correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scale values 'Not Yet Competent, Developing, Competent, Proficient, Expert' are visible in the scale list or edit form.

task_completion.description: The scale has the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description 'Scale for assessing clinical nursing competencies' is visible in the scale list or edit form.

task_completion.description: An assignment named 'Lab Skills Assessment' is created in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' shows an assignment activity named 'Lab Skills Assessment'.

task_completion.description: The assignment uses the 'Clinical Competency Scale' for grading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignment settings (Grade section) show 'Type' set to 'Scale' and 'Scale' set to 'Clinical Competency Scale', or the grading interface for the assignment shows these scale values.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle interface at http://localhost/.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or database commands to create the scale or assignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl, php, or mysql commands used to insert Moodle data directly.

integrity.description: The scale and assignment were created using the genuine Moodle GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Moodle's standard forms for adding a scale and adding an assignment activity.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course 'Introduction to Biology' has the shortname 'BIO101'. The expected scale name is 'Clinical Competency Scale' with values 'Not Yet Competent, Developing, Competent, Proficient, Expert'.
